calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Finra Dr Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'s Petition To Confirm FINRA-DR Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
